title: Asymptotic Time, Space, and Growth · Invariant Lens: Big O Theta Omega
summary: Predict which ingestion design survives tenfold and thousandfold load increases. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa big o theta omega increment in a measured growth-rate decision notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish upper, tight, and lower asymptotic bounds without dropping relevant variables.
Define input size and dominant operations for scalar, sequence, graph, and numeric problems.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
